exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports child immunization visit and schedule terminology in DHA-licensed settings.

added_items.final_wording: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

exact_location.heading: 5.8 Catch-Up Immunization for Children Aged 4 Months Through 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports vaccination-history review and age-appropriate schedule or catch-up documentation.

added_items.final_wording: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
